Day advanced to 2026-02-12.
11,784 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
177 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 2 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-02-13): ['652747', '901381']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-11 -> 2026-02-12)

- "Which party will emerge as the main opposition in Bangladesh's new parliament after the 2026 election, based on seat results reported by February 13, 2026?" → Jamaat-e-Islami
- "Which aircraft carrier will join the USS Abraham Lincoln carrier strike group in the Middle East by the end of March 2026?" → Gerald R Ford
- "By the end of February 2026, which French city will be identified as the place where a French far-right activist was killed, leading to a public dispute between Emmanuel Macron and Giorgia Meloni?" → Lyon

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (153 resolved, 177 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
